THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 861 HAYES STREET ASSOCIATES,LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAROPOULOS, THEMISTOCLES AKA THOMAS KAROUPOULOS KAROPOULOS, THOMAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 861 HAYES ST., APT. B, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107 $16,800.00 PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR $16,800.00, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,800.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-30-2006, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFDNT. PAYS TO PLAINTIFF HALF OF THE THEN OUTSTANDING PRINCIPAL BALANCE OF JUDGMENT BEFORE FEB-28-2007, PLNTF. SHALL FILE A FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT UPON RECEIPT THEREOF. PLAINTIFF IS HOLDING SECURITY DEPOSITS & LAST MONTH'S RENT IN AMOUNT OF $2,400.00, TO BE CREDITED AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IF NO DAMAGES TO PREMISES UPON TWO DAYS OF DEFENDT. VACATING THE PREMISES; EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR HIS OWN COSTS & ATTORNEYS'FEES INCURRED; EACH PARTY RELEASES THE OTHER FROM CLAIMS; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
